channel.title: BrierStudios Releases
channel.description: Release timeline for BrierStudios: Yggdrasil CLI, Lilith variants, and the Nine Realms.

item.title: BrierStudios v4.1 — Site Maintenance & Security
item.description: Cloudflare Turnstile on contact form, honeypot spam protection, admin panel for viewing messages.

item.title: Lilith Page v2.6 — Helheim / Midgard / Svartalfheim Variants
item.description: Three new Lilith variants inspired by the dark realms of Norse cosmology.

item.title: Yggdrasil CLI Demo v2.5
item.description: Interactive CLI demo with new realm commands and improved output formatting.

item.title: Lilith v2.4 — Palette Update
item.description: Refined dark fantasy palette: deeper voids, warmer golds, colder steel.

item.title: Yggdrasil CLI v2.3 — Realms Module
item.description: Full Nine Realms tree implemented: Asgard, Vanaheim, Alfheim, Svartalfheim, Midgard, Jotunheim, Muspelheim, Niflheim, Helheim.

item.title: BrierStudios v2.2 — Identity Page
item.description: New about section with full studio identity and Norse mythology references.

item.title: Yggdrasil CLI v2.1 — Commands Module
item.description: Initial CLI command set: forge, summon, banish, scry.

item.title: Lilith v2.0 — Dark Fantasy Nordic Pivot
item.description: Major redesign: from cyberpunk neon to dark fantasy Nordic. Bronze crown with Elder Futhark runes, honey-gold eyes.

item.title: BrierStudios Genesis v1.0
item.description: Initial release. Norse mythology-themed creative technology studio.
